title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's Paraform has paid out over $50 million to human recruiters while competitors automate hiring, achieving 10x revenue growth in 2025. Kim argues that AI has made hiring noisier rather than faster, requiring 5,000 cold emails per hire versus 500 five years ago, and that human recruiters provide a competitive moat that algorithms cannot replicate.
